title: Worca Pipeline Learn Stage Events
description: Events from the LEARN stage that captures pipeline learnings (2 events).

oneOf.title: pipeline.learn.completed
oneOf.description: Emitted when the LEARN stage successfully saves learnings.

termination_type.description: How the run ended before learning (e.g. success, failure, interrupted).

learnings_path.description: Path to the saved learnings file.

oneOf.title: pipeline.learn.failed
oneOf.description: Emitted when the LEARN stage fails to save learnings.

error.description: Error message explaining why the learn stage failed.
